titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 182: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 182. (A.R. No. 433 of 1918.) TIRUKARUGĀVŪR, SIRKALI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Vēḷviḍainātha temple.

Incomplete. This inscription records the endowment of six pieces of land measuring one (vēli), 7 mā and 1 kāṇi in total extent after purchasing the same from residents of Kaḍalvāyil and another piece of land 1 mā and 1/2 kāṇi in extent with a house-site to the temple of Vēḷḷaḍai-Āṇḍār at Tirukkurugāvūr in Tiruvāli-nāḍu by the officer, Sembaṉ Aruḷaṉ Uttamanidhi alias Uttamaśōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷār.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 376.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟkki yāṇṭu patiñcāvatu deyam kaṭalvāyil bhumiyuṭaiya pāratāyan Īśvaraṉ brāhmaṇi nila pātiriyum Āttiraiyaṉ devan ṉilakaṇṭaṉ brāhmaṇi nilaṉ koṟṟiyum kaṭalvāyil bhumiyuṭaiya comattiyaṉ
Ātittaṉ piṭāruṉum Ivvaṉaivariṭaiyum tiruvāli nāṭṭut tirukkurukāvūr veḷḷaṭai Āṇṭārkku cempan ṉaruḷaṉ ṉuttama nitiyāṉa Uttamacoḻa muventaveḷār Ivarkaḷiṭai vilaiyum kumum koṇṭa nilam kaṭalvāyilil melkoṭṭakattu nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai locca
appiyāṭṭaṉukku Ūrkiḻān pāvaṉittan nāraṇan kan=tan tamma tukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai Uḷcciṟuvāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Ellai vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai kovintavāykkālukku teṟkkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa nilamarai
yum Itu Allatu Araimāvukku kiḻpārkkellai kāppiyan kāḷi kaḻiyanum tampimārun ṉilattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai cāttan nārāyaṇaṉ tiruvaṭikaḷ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai tirumeṟṟaḷitevar nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai
kkālukkum tirumeṟṟaḷitevar nilattukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilumakappaṭṭa nilamaraimāvum kiḻūr muṉṟumāvukku kiḻpārkkellai Ūrkkiḻān pāvaṉittan kāṭampālai nilattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai kunṟappoḻanvāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai moci nākaṉ vāy
yārkkellai Ūrkkiḻān pāvaṉittan kāṭan kecavan ṉilattukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷakappaṭṭa nilam muṉṟu māvum koṭṭakattu Iraṇṭu mākāṇikku kiḻpārkkellai kāśyapan ceruvan ṉampaṉ nilattukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai Irumpilivāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Ūrkiḻān
vaṭapārkkellai Ūrkiḻān pāvanittaṉ tavaraṉ centaṉ nilattukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyu makappaṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum Iñce Araikkālukku kiḻpārkellai Ūrkiḻān pāvanittaṉ nārāyaṇan Irāmatevan nilattukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai Irātitān ṉārāyaṇan kumaraṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum mel
tukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Ūrkiḻān pāvanittan kuṇatiranāraṇan nilattukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilumakappaṭṭa nilamaraikkālum Ituvallatu Oru māvukku kiḻpārkkellai pālāciriyan tattan cantiracekaraṉ nilattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai pāvanittan kāṭampālai nilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkel
kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Irumpili vāykkālukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilumakappaṭṭa nilam Oru māvum Āka nilam Oṉṟe Eḻumākkāṇi Illa maṉaikku kiḻpārkkellai pāvanittan vaikuntaṉum tampimārum nilattukku meṟku teṉpārkkellai pāvanittan kāṭan kecuvan nilattukku vaṭakkum mel
nteva nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai mokiliyan niṉṟān vaṭukan nilattukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyum Akappaṭa Immaṉaiyum śrīpañcavanmahādevicaturvveti maṅkalattu karu kāvatikku meṟkum mulaparuṭaivāykkālukku teṟkum
ṭainta mutal caturam kayntavāṟṟāl Āttakūr Ātittapiṭārakramavitta nuḷḷiṭṭa caturattārkku paṭṭamunṟu māvil vaṭakkaṭaiya nān naṭaittuṭaittu muṭaiyenāna Oru māvaraikkāṇiyum
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
